title: My corner of the internet.
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const o={h1:"h1",hr:"hr",p:"p",...i.components};return n(e,{children:[t(o.h1,{children:"Hello!"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"I am just a normal engineering student. Just like any other engineering student bored out of my wits, I got into philosophy, why? because engineering makes you question your life. Actually Engineering is not the problem, the problem is the gap between the expectation people have on us versus what the world/university teaches us. College teaches us to be a good boy, learn what you are taught, spit it out in the exam. What we learn is the basics, basics is good but it is definitely not enough for a job."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"But you know this is where i like to defer, earning money is a skill, the one who provides value to the world will be repaid in money. Everybody is very quick to blame the education system and blame the government. It is not their job to force you to provide value to the society, it is their job to aid it. If you decide that you want to provide value to the world by solving problems, making inventions and building things in the field of engineering then you must go to an engineering college, there they will give you all the basics needed to become a successful engineer. Be very careful with how you interpret this because i am not saying they will make u a good engineer, i am saying they will give u the basics, just like how school can give you knowledge but the knowledge on how to live life has to be gained by actually living life."}),"
",t(o.hr,{}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"This is my corner of the internet and i am ready to open my mind to it, it might seem random and untimed, but this is my attempt at starting to provide value to the world."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
